## Product Impact

## Source Boundary

- [ ] I did not commit runtime state from `.hermes-home/`.
- [ ] I did not commit generated product outputs, versions, exported decks, published-draft markers, or local `.env` files.
- [ ] If I promoted a runtime product into `products/`, I ran `pnpm product:check -- <product-dir>`.
- [ ] If I promoted a built-in product, its README explains the `Product Shape` it demonstrates.
- [ ] If I committed product media assets, they are credited in `assets/CREDITS.md`.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm release:check` when this is release-facing
